terrain_features: Rockbud cluster (edible, glows faintly with stormlight)
Chasm opening (50ft deep, narrow enough to bridge)
Plateau edge (sheer 200ft drop to chasm floor)
Lavis polyp field (farmland, ankle-deep water channels)
Cremstone outcrop (dark, pitted stone, good cover)
Skyeel nesting area (dangerous but valuable gemhearts nearby)
Whitespine den (bones and carcasses scattered around entrance)
Bridge approach (narrow stone spanning a chasm)
Lait (sheltered area between rock formations, calm during storms)

spren_sightings.effect: Playful, may tug at loose items; no mechanical effect
Dance around fire sources; fires burn slightly brighter
Indicate infection or decay nearby; Investigation check DC 10
Manifest near frightened creatures; disadvantage on next Wisdom save
Swarm around injured creatures; indicate hidden wounded NPCs
Manifest around inspiring moments; advantage on next Charisma check
Dance around creative acts; +1 to next crafting check
Visible only to those near death; warning of mortal danger
Observe lawful acts closely; may report to Skybreakers
Rarely seen in Physical Realm; indicate a Windrunner bond forming

plateaus: Parshendi scouts in warform observing from distance
Bridge crew crossing with supplies (potential allies)
Highstorm approaching -- 30 minutes to find shelter
Skyeel flock overhead (1 in 6 chance of attack)
chasms: Santhid swimming in deep water pools
Ancient Shardblade embedded in rock (illusion or real?)
Flash flood from distant highstorm (Constitution save DC 15)
Preserved Dawncity mural with historical clue
settlements: Ardent preaching about the Almighty's will
Street fight between rival lighteyes retainers
